sourcesContent:
import { C } from '../components/ui'

export const SOLUTIONS = [
  {
    slug:"erp", heading:"ERP Solutions", icon:"Package", color:C.blue, bg:C.blueL,
    desc:"Core business operations",
    tagline:"Unify your entire business on one intelligent platform",
    overview:"Microsoft Dynamics 365 ERP transforms how your business manages finance, supply chain, commerce, and operations — replacing fragmented systems with a single source of truth powered by AI and real-time data.",
    items:[
      {
        slug:"business-central", n:"Package", t:"Business Central", tag:"Most Popular",
        d:"All-in-one ERP for growing SMBs",
        hero:"The go-to ERP for ambitious SMBs — finance, purchasing, inventory, sales and project management unified in one cloud solution. Most clients go live in under 90 days.",
        features:["Financial management & reporting","Purchase order & invoice automation","Inventory & warehouse management","Sales order processing","Project management & billing","Multi-currency & multi-entity","Built-in Power BI dashboards","Microsoft 365 & Teams integration"],
        benefits:[{v:"90",u:"Days",l:"Average go-live"},{v:"40%",u:"",l:"Faster month-end close"},{v:"3x",u:"",l:"First-year ROI"},{v:"99.9%",u:"",l:"Uptime SLA"}],
        useCases:["Manufacturing SMBs needing production visibility","Distribution companies managing complex inventory","Professional services tracking projects & billing","Retail businesses unifying online and offline sales"],
        faq:[{q:"How long does a Business Central implementation take?",a:"Most SMB implementations take 8–14 weeks depending on complexity, number of users and data migration requirements. We've delivered implementations in as little as 6 weeks for straightforward deployments."},{q:"Can I migrate from my current accounting software?",a:"Yes. We migrate from Sage, QuickBooks, Xero, older Dynamics NAV/GP versions and most other accounting platforms. Data integrity is guaranteed."},{q:"Is Business Central hosted in the cloud?",a:"Yes — it's a pure cloud SaaS solution hosted on Microsoft Azure, with 99.9% uptime SLA and automatic updates included."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"finance", n:"Dollar", t:"Finance",
        d:"Automate financials & compliance",
        hero:"Automate journals, consolidate multi-entity accounts, manage cashflow forecasting, and stay audit-ready — without the spreadsheet chaos at month-end.",
        features:["Automated journal entries & reconciliation","Multi-entity consolidation","Cashflow forecasting with AI","Budget management & variance analysis","Regulatory compliance & audit trail","Tax management across jurisdictions","Real-time financial dashboards","Intercompany transactions"],
        benefits:[{v:"80%",u:"",l:"Less manual data entry"},{v:"5 Days",u:"",l:"Month-end close (from 15)"},{v:"100%",u:"",l:"Audit trail coverage"},{v:"60+",u:"",l:"Countries supported"}],
        useCases:["Enterprises managing multiple legal entities","CFOs needing real-time financial visibility","Finance teams drowning in manual reconciliation","Businesses expanding into new geographies"],
        faq:[{q:"Does Dynamics 365 Finance support IFRS and local GAAP?",a:"Yes — it supports multiple accounting standards simultaneously, with localisation for 60+ countries out of the box."},{q:"Can it handle intercompany transactions automatically?",a:"Yes. Intercompany posting, netting and reconciliation are fully automated across all entities."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"supply-chain", n:"Truck", t:"Supply Chain",
        d:"End-to-end supply chain visibility",
        hero:"Real-time visibility from supplier to customer. Demand forecasting, warehouse management, IoT asset tracking and automated replenishment — all connected.",
        features:["Demand forecasting with AI","Warehouse management system (WMS)","Automated purchase order generation","Supplier collaboration portal","IoT-enabled asset tracking","Returns & reverse logistics","Transport management","Real-time inventory visibility"],
        benefits:[{v:"68%",u:"",l:"Fewer stock-outs"},{v:"30%",u:"",l:"Procurement cost reduction"},{v:"Real-time",u:"",l:"Inventory visibility"},{v:"2x",u:"",l:"Warehouse throughput"}],
        useCases:["Manufacturers needing production-to-delivery visibility","Distributors managing complex multi-warehouse operations","Retailers managing seasonal demand spikes","Businesses with global supplier networks"],
        faq:[{q:"Does this integrate with our existing WMS?",a:"Yes, we can integrate with most third-party WMS platforms, or use the built-in Dynamics 365 WMS which covers most enterprise warehouse scenarios."},{q:"How does the demand forecasting work?",a:"It uses historical sales data, seasonality, and external signals (like weather or economic indicators) to generate AI-driven replenishment recommendations."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"commerce", n:"Cart", t:"Commerce",
        d:"Unified omnichannel retail",
        hero:"POS, e-commerce, back-office stock and loyalty programmes all in real time. Consistent experience wherever customers shop — online, in-store, or via mobile.",
        features:["Unified POS & e-commerce platform","Real-time inventory across all channels","Customer loyalty & rewards programmes","Promotions & dynamic pricing engine","Supplier & vendor collaboration","Integrated returns management","Mobile-first store operations","AI-powered product recommendations"],
        benefits:[{v:"25%",u:"",l:"Increase in average order value"},{v:"40%",u:"",l:"Faster inventory turnover"},{v:"360°",u:"",l:"Customer view"},{v:"15+",u:"",l:"Channels unified"}],
        useCases:["Retailers with physical and online stores","Fashion brands managing seasonal collections","Grocery chains needing real-time stock accuracy","Franchise operators requiring centralised control"],
        faq:[{q:"Does it integrate with Shopify or WooCommerce?",a:"Yes — we build native integrations between Dynamics 365 Commerce and your existing e-commerce platform, or migrate you to the native D365 Commerce storefront."},{q:"Can it handle multiple store locations?",a:"Yes, including multi-currency, multi-language, location-specific pricing and centralised stock visibility across all locations."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"project-operations", n:"Brief", t:"Project Operations",
        d:"Delivery, billing & resourcing",
        hero:"Connect your CRM pipeline to project delivery — resource allocation, timesheets, subcontractor billing and client invoicing all in one place.",
        features:["Resource scheduling & capacity planning","Time & expense tracking","Project P&L visibility","Client invoicing & billing automation","Subcontractor management","Revenue recognition automation","Integration with Dynamics 365 Sales","Project health dashboards"],
        benefits:[{v:"35%",u:"",l:"Better resource utilisation"},{v:"50%",u:"",l:"Faster invoicing cycle"},{v:"Zero",u:"",l:"Revenue leakage"},{v:"98%",u:"",l:"Project delivery accuracy"}],
        useCases:["Consulting firms managing client engagements","Engineering companies tracking project costs","IT services businesses billing by milestone","Any project-based business losing revenue to manual billing"],
        faq:[{q:"Can it handle fixed-price and time-and-materials contracts?",a:"Yes — both contract types are supported, with revenue recognition rules configurable per contract."},{q:"Does it connect to Dynamics 365 Sales?",a:"Yes, natively. Opportunities convert directly to projects, maintaining a single thread from pipeline to delivery."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"human-resources", n:"Users", t:"Human Resources",
        d:"Modern HR, payroll & workforce",
        hero:"Full employee lifecycle management — benefits, performance reviews, learning paths, absence tracking and payroll — in one modern HR platform.",
        features:["Employee onboarding & offboarding","Performance management & reviews","Learning & development pathways","Absence & leave management","Benefits administration","Payroll integration","Workforce analytics","Self-service employee portal"],
        benefits:[{v:"60%",u:"",l:"Less HR admin time"},{v:"90%",u:"",l:"Employee self-service rate"},{v:"Zero",u:"",l:"Compliance gaps"},{v:"2x",u:"",l:"Faster onboarding"}],
        useCases:["Growing businesses scaling their HR function","Enterprises managing complex multi-site workforce","Businesses struggling with manual HR processes","Companies investing in employee development"],
        faq:[{q:"Does it integrate with payroll providers?",a:"Yes — we integrate with ADP, Sage Payroll, Moorepay and most other payroll providers, or can use the built-in payroll module for supported regions."},{q:"Can employees self-serve leave requests and payslips?",a:"Yes — the self-service portal lets employees manage leave, view payslips, update personal info and complete training — all without HR involvement."}],
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug:"crm", heading:"CRM Solutions", icon:"Target", color:C.purple, bg:C.purpleL,
    desc:"Customer relationships",
    tagline:"Build lasting customer relationships with AI at every touchpoint",
    overview:"Dynamics 365 CRM connects every customer interaction — from first marketing touch through sale, service, and renewal — with AI surfacing the right action at every moment.",
    items:[
      {
        slug:"customer-service", n:"Headphones", t:"Customer Service",
        d:"Omnichannel support & AI",
        hero:"Routes cases intelligently across email, chat, voice and social — with AI surfacing the right answers before your agent even has to search.",
        features:["Omnichannel case routing","AI-suggested responses","Knowledge base management","SLA tracking & escalation","Customer self-service portal","Sentiment analysis","Agent performance dashboards","Teams & Outlook integration"],
        benefits:[{v:"35%",u:"",l:"Reduction in handle time"},{v:"92%",u:"",l:"First-contact resolution"},{v:"+18",u:"pts",l:"NPS improvement"},{v:"24/7",u:"",l:"AI-assisted coverage"}],
        useCases:["Contact centres managing high case volumes","B2B businesses needing SLA compliance","Businesses with complex multi-channel support","Companies looking to reduce support cost with AI"],
        faq:[{q:"Which channels does it support?",a:"Email, live chat, SMS, WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger, Twitter/X, and voice — all managed from a single agent workspace."},{q:"How does the AI response suggestion work?",a:"It reads the incoming case, searches your knowledge base and previous similar cases, and suggests a response the agent can send with one click or edit."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"sales", n:"Target", t:"Sales",
        d:"AI-powered pipeline management",
        hero:"AI-scored leads, guided next-best actions, accurate pipeline forecasting and automated follow-ups. Reps spend time closing, not updating records.",
        features:["AI lead & opportunity scoring","Guided selling with next-best actions","Pipeline forecasting with AI","Automated follow-up sequences","Sales playbooks","Revenue intelligence","Conversation intelligence","LinkedIn Sales Navigator integration"],
        benefits:[{v:"28%",u:"",l:"Higher win rate"},{v:"40%",u:"",l:"Less admin per rep"},{v:"95%",u:"",l:"Forecast accuracy"},{v:"2x",u:"",l:"Pipeline velocity"}],
        useCases:["B2B sales teams managing complex deals","Sales leaders needing accurate revenue forecasting","High-volume inside sales teams","Businesses with long, complex sales cycles"],
        faq:[{q:"How is AI forecasting different from traditional CRM forecasting?",a:"Instead of relying on rep-entered probability estimates, AI forecasting analyses deal signals — emails sent, meetings held, sentiment — to generate an objective prediction."},{q:"Does it work with Outlook and Teams?",a:"Yes — the Dynamics 365 Sales app sits directly inside Outlook and Teams, so reps can update records without leaving their inbox."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"field-service", n:"Wrench", t:"Field Service",
        d:"Smart scheduling & maintenance",
        hero:"Intelligent scheduling, predictive maintenance alerts and a mobile app technicians will actually use — reducing repeat visits and delighting customers.",
        features:["Intelligent scheduling & dispatch","Predictive maintenance with IoT","Technician mobile app (offline-capable)","Parts inventory management","Work order management","Customer communication automation","SLA & contract management","Finance integration"],
        benefits:[{v:"25%",u:"",l:"More jobs per technician/day"},{v:"40%",u:"",l:"Fewer repeat visits"},{v:"30%",u:"",l:"Parts cost reduction"},{v:"4.8★",u:"",l:"Average customer rating"}],
        useCases:["Facilities management companies","Medical equipment maintenance providers","Industrial machinery service businesses","Utilities & energy companies"],
        faq:[{q:"Does the mobile app work without internet?",a:"Yes — the technician app works fully offline and syncs automatically when connectivity is restored."},{q:"How does predictive maintenance work?",a:"IoT sensors on assets send data to Azure IoT Hub; AI models detect anomaly patterns and automatically create work orders before failure occurs."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"customer-insights", n:"Brain", t:"Customer Insights",
        d:"Unified profiles & AI journeys",
        hero:"Unify CRM, ERP, e-commerce and marketing data into consent-based unified profiles. AI segmentation and journey orchestration at scale.",
        features:["Unified customer data platform","AI-powered segmentation","Real-time journey orchestration","Consent & privacy management","Predictive churn models","CLV prediction","Cross-channel attribution","All D365 modules integration"],
        benefits:[{v:"360°",u:"",l:"Customer profile completeness"},{v:"45%",u:"",l:"Higher campaign conversion"},{v:"22%",u:"",l:"Churn reduction"},{v:"3x",u:"",l:"Personalisation at scale"}],
        useCases:["Enterprises with fragmented customer data","Retail & e-commerce needing personalisation","Financial services tracking the full client journey","B2B businesses mapping complex buying committees"],
        faq:[{q:"What data sources can it unify?",a:"Any data source with a connector — CRM, ERP, e-commerce, loyalty systems, call centre data, web analytics — all unified into a single GDPR-compliant profile."},{q:"How is consent managed?",a:"Customer Insights has built-in consent management that respects opt-in/opt-out at the channel and purpose level, with full audit trail."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"marketing", n:"Megaphone", t:"Marketing",
        d:"Multi-channel campaign management",
        hero:"Personalised multi-channel campaigns, AI lead scoring, event management and real-time customer journey orchestration — connected to your CRM pipeline.",
        features:["Email, SMS & social campaign builder","AI-powered lead scoring","Event & webinar management","Real-time journey orchestration","A/B testing & optimisation","Marketing attribution reporting","Lead nurturing automation","Dynamics 365 Sales integration"],
        benefits:[{v:"55%",u:"",l:"Higher MQL to SQL rate"},{v:"3x",u:"",l:"Campaign ROI"},{v:"70%",u:"",l:"Less manual campaign work"},{v:"Real-time",u:"",l:"Lead handoff to sales"}],
        useCases:["B2B marketing teams running demand generation","Retail brands running loyalty campaigns","Event-driven businesses managing attendee journeys","Businesses wanting marketing & sales tightly connected"],
        faq:[{q:"How does lead handoff to sales work?",a:"When a lead reaches a configured scoring threshold, they're automatically assigned to the right salesperson in Dynamics 365 Sales with full engagement history attached."},{q:"Can it manage events and webinars?",a:"Yes — including registration pages, reminder emails, attendance tracking, and post-event follow-up journeys, all built into the platform."}],
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    slug:"power-platform", heading:"Power Platform", icon:"Zap", color:C.teal, bg:C.tealL,
    desc:"Build & automate anything",
    tagline:"Extend, automate and analyse — without heavy IT",
    overview:"Microsoft Power Platform lets every team in your business build apps, automate workflows, analyse data and publish portals — all connected natively to Dynamics 365.",
    items:[
      {
        slug:"power-apps", n:"Cpu", t:"Power Apps",
        d:"No-code / low-code custom apps",
        hero:"Build custom business applications that extend Dynamics 365 exactly the way your business works — no heavy development required.",
        features:["Drag-and-drop app builder","Mobile-first responsive design","500+ data source connectors","Offline mobile capability","AI Builder integration","Role-based access control","Embed in Teams & SharePoint","Custom connectors"],
        benefits:[{v:"70%",u:"",l:"Faster app development"},{v:"10x",u:"",l:"Less cost vs custom dev"},{v:"500+",u:"",l:"Data connectors"},{v:"Hours",u:"",l:"From idea to app"}],
        useCases:["Field teams needing mobile inspection apps","HR teams building onboarding tools","Finance teams automating approval workflows","Operations teams digitising paper-based processes"],
        faq:[{q:"Do users need coding skills?",a:"No — Power Apps has a fully visual, drag-and-drop interface. For more advanced requirements, a maker with basic formula skills (similar to Excel) can go very far."},{q:"How does it connect to Dynamics 365?",a:"Power Apps connects natively to Dataverse (the database behind Dynamics 365) with no integration required."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"power-automate", n:"Zap", t:"Power Automate",
        d:"Workflow & process automation",
        hero:"Automate approval chains, data sync, notifications and complex multi-step workflows across 1,000+ services — from simple email alerts to enterprise RPA.",
        features:["1,000+ pre-built connectors","Robotic Process Automation (RPA)","AI-powered document processing","Scheduled & event-triggered flows","Approval workflow builder","Exception handling & error alerts","Power BI integration","Microsoft 365 deep integration"],
        benefits:[{v:"80%",u:"",l:"Reduction in manual tasks"},{v:"1000+",u:"",l:"Supported applications"},{v:"Zero",u:"",l:"Coding required"},{v:"Hours",u:"",l:"Saved per employee/week"}],
        useCases:["Finance teams automating invoice processing","HR automating employee onboarding tasks","Sales teams triggering CRM updates automatically","IT teams automating provisioning workflows"],
        faq:[{q:"What's the difference between cloud flows and desktop flows?",a:"Cloud flows automate web-based services (like sending an email when a D365 record changes). Desktop flows use RPA to automate legacy desktop applications with no API."},{q:"Can it automate processes in our legacy systems?",a:"Yes — the RPA capability can record and replay interactions with any Windows desktop application, including legacy ERP and bespoke software."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"power-bi", n:"PieChart", t:"Power BI",
        d:"Interactive BI dashboards & reports",
        hero:"Interactive dashboards, drill-down reports and AI-powered natural language Q&A — embedded natively in every Dynamics 365 module your team already uses.",
        features:["100+ chart & visualisation types","AI-powered natural language Q&A","Real-time streaming dashboards","Paginated reports for print/PDF","Composite models & dataflows","Row-level security","Embedded analytics in D365","Azure Synapse integration"],
        benefits:[{v:"Self-serve",u:"",l:"Analytics for every team"},{v:"Real-time",u:"",l:"Data refresh capability"},{v:"100+",u:"",l:"Visualisation types"},{v:"Zero",u:"",l:"SQL knowledge required"}],
        useCases:["CFOs needing real-time financial visibility","Operations teams tracking KPIs daily","Sales leaders monitoring pipeline health","Executives needing boardroom-ready reports"],
        faq:[{q:"How often does data refresh?",a:"Scheduled refresh can run up to 48 times per day (every 30 minutes). With Premium capacity or Direct Query, dashboards can show truly real-time data."},{q:"Can non-technical users build their own reports?",a:"Yes — that's the core purpose. Power BI Desktop has a drag-and-drop interface, and once published, users can slice and filter without any training."}],
      },
      {
        slug:"power-pages", n:"Globe", t:"Power Pages",
        d:"External-facing web portals",
        hero:"Build secure, data-driven external websites — partner portals, customer self-service hubs — with no-code tools connected directly to your Dynamics 365 data.",
        features:["No-code portal builder","Customer self-service portal","Partner & dealer portals","Secure authentication (Azure AD B2C)","Connected to D365 data real-time","Responsive mobile design","Multi-language support","Custom domain & branding"],
        benefits:[{v:"40%",u:"",l:"Fewer support tickets"},{v:"Days",u:"",l:"Portal deployment time"},{v:"24/7",u:"",l:"Self-service availability"},{v:"Zero",u:"",l:"Developer dependency"}],
        useCases:["Businesses building customer self-service portals","Manufacturers managing dealer/partner networks","Professional services sharing project status with clients","Healthcare organisations publishing patient portals"],
        faq:[{q:"Can customers see and update their own CRM records?",a:"Yes — customers can view cases, orders, invoices and update their own profile data, all connected live to your Dynamics 365 records."},{q:"Is it secure for external users?",a:"Yes — Azure AD B2C handles authentication, with configurable MFA, and row-level security ensures users only see their own data."}],
      },
    ],
  },
]

export const SERVICES = [
  {
    slug:"implementation", n:"Rocket", t:"D365 Implementation", color:C.blue, bg:C.blueL,
    tagline:"Your go-live, done right — on time and on budget",
    overview:"We've delivered 350+ Dynamics 365 implementations across every module and industry. Our proven 5-phase methodology eliminates the surprises that derail most ERP and CRM projects.",
    features:["Detailed fit-gap analysis & scoping","Phased project plan with clear milestones","Dedicated project manager & solution architect","Full data migration & validation","User acceptance testing (UAT) management","Hypercare support post go-live","Change management & communications plan","Executive steering committee cadence"],
    process:["Discovery & scoping (Weeks 1–2)","Solution design & client sign-off (Weeks 3–4)","Build, configure & integrate (Weeks 5–10)","Test, train & validate (Weeks 11–13)","Go-live & hypercare (Weeks 14–16)"],
    stats:[{v:"350+",l:"Implementations delivered"},{v:"96%",l:"On-time go-live rate"},{v:"6–16",l:"Typical weeks to go-live"},{v:"Zero",l:"Failed implementations"}],
    testimonial:{q:"Go-live was seamless. The team was there on the day and the week after. We were up and running without a single day of downtime.",name:"Sarah Mitchell",role:"CFO, Ashford Manufacturing"},
    faq:[{q:"What size of business do you implement for?",a:"We work with businesses from 20 to 2,000+ users — from first-time ERP adopters to enterprises replacing SAP or Oracle."},{q:"What if our requirements change during the project?",a:"We use an agile delivery approach with sprint reviews, so scope changes are managed transparently with no surprise costs."},{q:"Do you provide post go-live support?",a:"Yes — all implementations include a hypercare period and we offer ongoing managed support packages to continue supporting your team."}],
  },
  {
    slug:"upgrade-migration", n:"Layers", t:"Upgrade & Migration", color:C.purple, bg:C.purpleL,
    tagline:"Move from NAV, AX, GP or any legacy ERP — without the risk",
    overview:"Whether you're on Dynamics NAV, AX, GP or a completely different ERP, we migrate your data, customisations and workflows to modern Dynamics 365 — preserving what works and improving what doesn't.",
    features:["Legacy system audit & full assessment","Data cleansing & transformation plan","Customisation re-evaluation & rebuild","Parallel running period support","Full historical data migration","User retraining & change management","Business process reengineering where needed","Post-migration optimisation sprint"],
    process:["Legacy audit & gap analysis (Week 1)","Migration strategy & design (Weeks 2–3)","Data extraction, cleanse & map (Weeks 4–6)","Configure, build & test (Weeks 7–10)","Cutover planning & go-live (Weeks 11–12)"],
    stats:[{v:"200+",l:"Migrations completed"},{v:"100%",l:"Data integrity guaranteed"},{v:"Zero",l:"Business interruptions"},{v:"All versions",l:"NAV/AX/GP supported"}],
    testimonial:{q:"We moved from Dynamics NAV 2013 to Business Central in 10 weeks. The data migration was flawless — not a single record lost.",name:"Raj Patel",role:"IT Director, PrimeLine Distribution"},
    faq:[{q:"Can you migrate from non-Microsoft ERP systems?",a:"Yes — we've migrated from SAP, Sage, Epicor, SYSPRO, NetSuite and many others. Our data migration tooling handles most source formats."},{q:"How do you handle customisations from our old system?",a:"We audit every customisation, advise on what standard D365 functionality now covers, and rebuild or replace only what's genuinely needed."},{q:"Is there downtime during the migration?",a:"We run a parallel period so the business continues on the old system until we're 100% confident. Cutover is typically done over a weekend."}],
  },
  {
    slug:"customisation", n:"Settings", t:"Customisation & Development", color:C.teal, bg:C.tealL,
    tagline:"Extend Dynamics 365 to work exactly the way your business does",
    overview:"When standard functionality doesn't go far enough, our development team builds exactly what you need — using Microsoft's best-practice extension framework so your upgrades are never blocked.",
    features:["Custom module development (AL / X++)","Business Central & F&SCM extensions","Power Platform custom connectors","API integrations & middleware build","Custom reporting & SSRS / RDLC","ISV solution customisation","Mobile app development (Power Apps)","Performance optimisation & refactoring"],
    process:["Requirements capture & user stories (Week 1)","Technical design & architecture (Week 2)","Development sprints with demos (Weeks 3–8)","QA, regression & UAT (Weeks 9–10)","Deployment, documentation & handover (Week 11)"],
    stats:[{v:"500+",l:"Custom solutions built"},{v:"Zero",l:"Upgrade-blocking customisations"},{v:"100%",l:"Documented & supported"},{v:"48hrs",l:"Typical bug-fix turnaround"}],
    testimonial:{q:"They built a completely bespoke manufacturing module that integrated with our production line. It's been running without issues for 3 years.",name:"James Whitmore",role:"Operations Director, Crestwood Manufacturing"},
    faq:[{q:"Will customisations block future Microsoft updates?",a:"No — all our development follows Microsoft's extension-based model (AL for BC, X++ for F&SCM), which is upgrade-safe by design."},{q:"Do you provide documentation for custom code?",a:"Yes — every piece of custom code is documented, and we provide a developer handover pack so your team or any future partner can maintain it."},{q:"Can you take over customisations built by another partner?",a:"Yes — we assess and take over third-party code regularly. We'll be honest about quality and advise on the most cost-effective approach."}],
  },
  {
    slug:"integration", n:"Globe", t:"Integration Services", color:C.orange, bg:C.orangeL,
    tagline:"Connect Dynamics 365 to every system in your business",
    overview:"Your Dynamics 365 should talk to your entire technology stack. We design, build and support integrations with any system — from legacy ERP to modern SaaS — using Azure Integration Services.",
    features:["Azure Logic Apps & Service Bus architecture","Azure API Management & custom APIs","REST & SOAP API development","EDI & 3PL logistics integration","E-commerce integration (Shopify, WooCommerce)","Payroll & HR system connectors","Legacy system bridges","Real-time & batch integration patterns"],
    process:["Integration assessment & mapping (Week 1)","Architecture design & approval (Weeks 2–3)","Development (Weeks 4–8)","Testing, monitoring & alerting setup (Weeks 9–10)","Deployment & runbook documentation (Week 11)"],
    stats:[{v:"1,000+",l:"Integrations built"},{v:"500+",l:"Third-party systems connected"},{v:"Real-time",l:"Data synchronisation"},{v:"99.95%",l:"Integration uptime"}],
    testimonial:{q:"They integrated our D365 with our 3PL, our Shopify store, and our legacy payroll system. Everything talks to everything now.",name:"Emma Clarke",role:"CTO, NovaTel Retail"},
    faq:[{q:"What's your preferred integration platform?",a:"Azure Integration Services (Logic Apps, Service Bus, API Management) for most scenarios — it's enterprise-grade, scalable and Microsoft-native."},{q:"Can you integrate with very old legacy systems with no API?",a:"Yes — for systems with no modern API, we use file-based integration (SFTP, flat files) or RPA via Power Automate Desktop to automate interactions."},{q:"What monitoring do you put in place?",a:"All integrations include Azure Monitor alerting, dead-letter queue handling, retry logic and a runbook so issues can be diagnosed and resolved quickly."}],
  },
  {
    slug:"managed-support", n:"LifeBuoy", t:"Managed Support", color:C.green, bg:C.greenL,
    tagline:"A named expert, not a ticket queue",
    overview:"SLA-backed managed support with consultants who know your system — proactive monitoring, rapid incident response and regular optimisation sessions to keep your Dynamics 365 at peak performance.",
    features:["24/7 incident monitoring & alerting","Named support consultant (not a call centre)","SLA-backed response (1hr critical, 4hr standard)","Proactive system health monitoring","Monthly optimisation & review sessions","D365 update testing & safe deployment","User query & ad-hoc training support","Licence management advisory"],
    process:["System onboarding & documentation (Week 1)","Monitoring & alerting setup (Week 2)","First monthly optimisation review (Week 4)","Ongoing monthly reviews & quarterly business reviews","Annual licence, roadmap & renewal review"],
    stats:[{v:"1hr",l:"Critical incident SLA"},{v:"99.9%",l:"Client system uptime"},{v:"4.9★",l:"Average support rating"},{v:"Named",l:"Consultant, not a queue"}],
    testimonial:{q:"Having a named consultant who knows our system is worth everything. They spotted a performance issue before we even noticed it.",name:"David Chen",role:"Finance Director, BluePeak Group"},
    faq:[{q:"What's included in the monthly support?",a:"Proactive monitoring, SLA-backed incident response, monthly review calls, user query support, and update testing. Ad-hoc development hours are available as an add-on."},{q:"Is there a minimum contract term?",a:"We prefer 12-month terms to build proper knowledge of your system, but we offer flexible arrangements for businesses with short-term needs."},{q:"What happens when Microsoft releases updates?",a:"We test all major updates in your sandbox environment before they go to production, and we manage the deployment to minimise any disruption."}],
  },
  {
    slug:"training", n:"BookOpen", t:"User Training & Adoption", color:"#7C3AED", bg:"#f5f0ff",
    tagline:"Technology only delivers ROI when people actually use it",
    overview:"Role-based training programmes designed around how your teams work — not generic click-through demos. From admin super-users to executives, every person gets exactly the training they need.",
